prompt: I need to write a Kannada tech article. Help me coin Dravidian words for: software, programmer, algorithm, database, and artificial intelligence.

assertions.name: no-english-loanwords-unexplained
assertions.description: Does not simply transliterate English (e.g. no ಸಾಫ್ಟ್ವೇರ್ as the answer)

assertions.name: explains-formation-strategy
assertions.description: Explains why suffix vs compound strategy was chosen
